description: Evaluate a construction bid tabulation in WPS Spreadsheet by processing the raw data from /home/ga/Documents/raw_bid_tabulation.csv into a three-sheet workbook saved as /home/ga/Documents/bid_evaluation.xlsx. The 'Bid Tab' sheet must contain the source data and extended costs for the Engineer and bidders (Apex, Titan, Horizon) in columns 'Eng_Extended', 'Apex_Extended', 'Titan_Extended', and 'Horizon_Extended'. The 'Summary' sheet must include a table for all parties showing 'Total Bid', 'Variance from Eng ($)', and 'Variance (%)', with the lowest bidder's name in cell B8 and the label 'Apparent Low Bidder:' in cell A8. The 'Unbalanced Analysis' sheet must include 'Item_No', 'Description', 'Unit Price Ratio' (Low Bidder/Engineer), and an 'Audit Flag' column marking items 'UNBALANCED' if the ratio is > 1.5 or < 0.5, and 'OK' otherwise.
